headline: Which Stock Sent the Dow to 52,000? Hint: It Wasn’t a Tech Giant
summary: If the Dow’s ascent to 52,000 were a World Cup match, then  Alphabet  involvement was akin to a soccer player being substituted on in the final moments and scoring the fourth goal in a 4-0 win.  What’s more, if the Mag 7 can roll back the years and start having a positive impact on the Dow, it could even reach 53,000 before the World Cup is over.

headline: Travelers Advances AI Strategy with Award-Winning Insurance-Specific Large Language Model
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., June 30, 2026--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today announced that it has developed TravelersLLM, a proprietary large language model tailored to its property casualty business.
